version_description: This version contain the colored chords needed to come close to the original song and melody performed by Lisa Stansfield. Please pay attention to that the guitar or key board needs to be tuned down around 5 cent or approx one quarter of a halv tone.
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: Guitar Pro tab for vocal, synth, bass, piano, strings and drums (ey-ya-yye).

content:
Song: All around the world
Artist: Lisa Stansfield
Music/Lyrics:  Devaney Ian Owen / Stansfield Lisa / Morris Andrew
Chord proposal: Mats Fagergren, 2021.

referense: https://youtube.com/watch?v=JVuuatjHGnY&feature=share

*************************************************************************************************
*Obs! Tune down your guitar as in the original arrangement which mean 5 cent (1/4 th step down) *
*************************************************************************************************

Please use the chords according to the instruction below.
       E,A,D,G,B,e
Dmaj7. x,5,7,6,x,x 
E.     x,x,6,4,5,x 
Eb/F.  x,8,8,8,8,x 
Ebm9.  x,6,4,6,6,x
Ab/Eb. x,6,6,5,4,4
Dm7.   10,12,10,10,10,10
Gbmaj7 x,9,11,10,11,9
Fm7.   x,8,10,8,9,8 
Cm7.   8,10,8,8,8,8
Dbmaj7 x,4,6,5,6,4
Bbm7.  6,8,6,6,6,6
Bbm.   6,8,8,6,6,6 
[tab]F7-13. 1,x,1,2,2,x[/tab]

[intro]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  I don't know where my baby is[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
 But I'll find him,    somewhere, somehow[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  I've got to let him know how much I care[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
  I'll never give up looking for my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/F[/ch]
.....[/tab]

[chorus]

[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
Been around the world and I, I, I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]    [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
I can't find my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
I don't know when, I don't know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
Why he's gone away[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]                         [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
And I don't know where he can be, my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]F7-13[/ch]
But I'm gonna find him[/tab]

[verse 1]

[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]              [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
 We had a quarrel   and I let myself go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
  I said so many things, things he didn't know[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Ebm9[/ch]
And I was, oh, oh, so bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]F7-13[/ch]
  I don't think he's coming back, mm, mhm[/tab]

[verse2]

[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]               [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
He gave the reason, the reasons he should go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
And he said things he hadn't said before[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
And he was, oh, oh, so mad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]
   And I don't think he's coming back, coming back[/tab]

[bridge]

[tab][ch]Eb/F[/ch]
I did too much lying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
Wasted too much time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb/F[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
Now I'm here and crying, I, I, I[/tab]

[chorus]

[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
Been around the world and I, I, I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]    [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
I can't find my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
I don't know when, I don't know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
Why he's gone away[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]                         [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
And I don't know where he can be, my baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]F7-13[/ch]
But I'm gonna find him[/tab]

[interlude]

|| [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] ( pause )
[ch]Gbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch] || ( x2 )

[verse3]

[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]
So open hearted,   he never did me wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I was the one, the weakest one of all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]
And now I'm, oh, oh, so sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]
   I don't think he's coming back, coming back[/tab]
